info.name: GFW API - Public endpoints v3
info.description:
- Public GFW endpoints that includes V3
    
- To get a token go to [GFW Token page](https://globalfishingwatch.org/our-apis/tokens/signup)
    
- Read all [API documentation here](https://globalfishingwatch.org/our-apis/documentation#introduction)
    

IMPORTANT! Remember to setup environment variables like {{bearer_token}}

item.name: Quick Start
Basic search by IMO

request.description: Searches for a vessel given a free form query. The query will be matched against any idenTIFiers for the vessel, and a paginated, ranked results list will be returned.

item.name: Get Events - fishing example
4wings API
Error Handling
422 - Generate PNG - missing field dataset
422 - wrong body (region id JSON is wrong)
422 - Zoom is greater than 12
204 - Generate PNG with temporal filter and gear type that has no data
422 Max 1 year

Generate PNG with temporal filter
Generate PNG with flag filter and temporal

Get PNG tile (hour)
MVT format

item.description:
For AIS vessel identity dataset, the fields allow are:

- "registryLastUpdateDate",
    
- "shipname",
    
- "nShipname",
    
- "ssvid",
    
- "callsign",
    
- "imo",
    
- "flag",
    
- "geartypes",
    
- "transmissionDateFrom",
    
- "transmissionDateTo",
    
- "combinedSourcesInfo.shiptypes.name",
    
- "combinedSourcesInfo.geartypes.name",
    
- "selfReportedInfo.id",
    
- "selfReportedInfo.shipname",
    
- "selfReportedInfo.nShipname",

- "selfReportedInfo.callsign",
